MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Kasra Rastani, M.D.'s demurrer to the first amended complaint is overruled in its entirety.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Continued To Jun-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Bret Landers, Esq. of Oium Reyen & Pryor, 415.392.8300, for Defendant Kasra Rastani, M.D.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

DEFENDANT KASRA RASTANI, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The matter is called. The Court notes that counsel feels like the meet and confer requirement was met and that it is prepared to reset the matter to another date. Brief DISCUSSIONS are held.

At the conclusion of the discussions, DEFENDANT KASRA RASTANI, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to June 3, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Mr. Landess is to provide notice to opposing counsel.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
